tool.name: RGI bwt
tool.description: align metagenomic reads to CARD to identify AMR genes
tool.command: mkdir -p staging && rgi load @CMD_CARD_LOAD_ARGS@ @CMD_WILDCARD_LOAD_ARGS@ --local && rgi bwt -1 '$read_one' #if $read_two -2 '$read_two' #end if -a '$aligner' -n \${GALAXY_SLOTS:-4} -o staging/output $include_wildcard $include_other_models $include_baits #if str($read_filters.mapq).strip() --mapq $read_filters.mapq #end if #if str($read_filters.mapped).strip() --mapped $read_filters.mapped #end if #if str($read_filters.coverage).strip() --coverage $read_filters.coverage #end if --local --clean

param.name: read_one
param.label: Read 1 (or single-end reads)
param.help: Quality-trimmed FASTQ reads. For single-end sequencing, provide only this file.

param.name: read_two
param.label: Read 2 (paired-end, optional)
param.help: Reverse reads for paired-end sequencing. Leave empty for single-end.

param.name: aligner
param.label: Read aligner
param.help: kma is fastest and recommended for metagenomics; bowtie2 and bwa are also supported.

param.label: Include wildcard variants (WildCARD)
param.help: Align reads against in silico predicted allelic variants in addition to canonical CARD sequences. Requires a WildCARD database to be selected above.

param.label: Include other model types
param.help: Include protein variant, rRNA variant, knockout, and protein overexpression models in addition to homolog models.

param.label: Include baits (experimental)
param.help: Include baits in alignment. This is an experimental feature.

param.label: Minimum MAPQ score
param.help: Filter reads with a MAPQ score below this threshold. Leave empty to disable.

param.label: Minimum mapped read count
param.help: Filter references with fewer than this many mapped reads. Leave empty to disable.

param.label: Minimum reference coverage (%)
param.help: Filter references with coverage below this percentage. Leave empty to disable.

tool.help:
**RGI bwt — Metagenomic Read Alignment to CARD**
Aligns metagenomic reads to the Comprehensive Antibiotic Resistance Database (CARD) and in silico predicted allelic variants (WildCARD) to identify antimicrobial resistance (AMR) genes in metagenomic samples.
-----
**Inputs**
- **Read 1** — quality-trimmed FASTQ reads (R1 for paired-end, or single-end). gzip-compressed FASTQ is accepted. - **Read 2** — reverse reads for paired-end sequencing (optional). - **CARD database** — Either select a pre-installed CARD release (set up by your Galaxy administrator) or supply a ``card.json`` file from your history. Download the latest release from https://card.mcmaster.ca/download.
-----
**Aligner**
- *kma* (default) — fast k-mer based aligner optimized for metagenomics. - *bowtie2* — short-read aligner; suitable for short Illumina reads. - *bwa* — general-purpose short-read aligner.
-----
**Include wildcard variants**
When enabled, reads are also aligned against in silico predicted allelic variants from the WildCARD database. This option requires a database entry that includes wildcard annotations — contact your Galaxy administrator if you need WildCARD support.
-----
**Read mapping filters**
These filters control which alignments are included in the output:
- *Minimum MAPQ* — exclude reads below the specified mapping quality threshold. - *Minimum mapped read count* — exclude references with too few mapped reads. - *Minimum reference coverage* — exclude references with insufficient coverage.
-----
**Outputs**
- **Allele mapping (tabular)** — per-allele mapping statistics including read counts, percent coverage, and AMR gene family. - **Allele mapping (JSON)** — same data in JSON format. - **Gene mapping (tabular)** — mapping results aggregated at the gene level. - **Overall mapping stats** — summary statistics for the entire BAM file. - **Reference mapping stats** — per-reference sequence mapping statistics. - **Artifacts mapping stats** — reads mapping to artifact sequences (e.g. plasmid markers used for quality control).
-----
**References**
Alcock et al. (2020). CARD 2020: antibiotic resistome surveillance with the Comprehensive Antibiotic Resistance Database. *Nucleic Acids Research*, 48(D1), D517–D525. doi:10.1093/nar/gkz935
RGI GitHub: https://github.com/arpcard/rgi
